message:
feat(storage): Cx-first next-8 hot-path siblings (ft-xbnl0.2.3)

Continue storage cx-first sweep with 8 more hot-path siblings from
the callsite-count ranking:

1. `get_event_annotations_with_cx(cx, event_id)` — 3+ callsites
   (event annotation read).
2. `remove_event_mute_with_cx(cx, identity_key)` — 2+ callsites
   (mute management).
3. `prune_segments_before_with_cx(cx, before_ts)` — 2+ callsites
   (retention sweep write).
4. `query_usage_metrics_with_cx(cx, query)` — 3+ callsites
   (metrics read).
5. `scan_segments_with_cx(cx, query)` — 3+ callsites (cass export
   + diagnostic segment scan).
6. `get_accounts_by_service_with_cx(cx, service)` — 3+ callsites
   (account lookup by service).
7. `export_gaps_with_cx(cx, query)` — 3+ callsites (diagnostic
   bundles).
8. `upsert_agent_session_with_cx(cx, session)` — 2+ callsites
   (agent session lifecycle write).

All eight are pre-flight-checkpoint delegates to the legacy methods,
strictly additive.

Legacy methods preserved unchanged.

Regression test `storage_tick120_hot_path_siblings_roundtrip` pins
the combined contract on a fresh DB — empty reads (annotations,
active mutes, metrics, segments, accounts, gaps all empty/None),
remove_event_mute returns false for absent key, prune_segments_before
returns 0, upsert_agent_session verifies session_id > 0. Pane 1 is
seeded up-front for the FK constraint on agent_session.

Verified via fork bypass (CC=llvm clang, CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/tmp/
ft-rusticmaple-target, --features asupersync-runtime): 481/481
storage tests pass.

Storage cx-first coverage now at 36/140 methods. Running total
captures startup + top 33 business method callsites (~175 call
sites total).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
